title: lithocardium
intro: Lithocardium is a plant-based remedy derived from the leaves of the Digitalis purpurea, also known as foxglove, which contains digoxin and digoxinin, cardiac glycosides with potent medicinal properties. Traditionally, lithocardium has been used to treat conditions such as atrial fibrillation, congestive heart failure, and certain types of arrhythmias by stimulating the heart and increasing its pumping efficiency. The health benefits of lithocardium include improved cardiac function, increased energy levels, and enhanced overall cardiovascular well-being. Lithocardium is typically prepared as an herbal tincture or infusion and should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to its potent effects.
